title: UI Redesign: Auth & Onboarding Flow
description:
Modernize authentication pages and onboarding experience.

## Current State
- Login page: OAuth buttons (Google, Microsoft, Facebook, Apple) with SVG icons
- Logout page: Auto-signout with spinner
- Error page: Error code mapping with friendly messages
- Onboarding: 2-step flow (role selection → profile setup)
- Consent: 3-step COPPA flow (info → agreements → signature)
- Uses Card components with gradient backgrounds

## Required Changes
1. Create unified auth layout with branded sidebar/illustration
2. Add email/password option with validation
3. Modernize OAuth buttons with consistent styling
4. Add animated transitions between steps
5. Improve onboarding with progress indicator
6. Add age-appropriate theming preview in onboarding
7. Create welcome tour for first-time users
8. Add 'magic link' email authentication option

## Key Files
- /src/app/(auth)/login/page.tsx - Login page
- /src/app/(auth)/logout/page.tsx - Logout page
- /src/app/(auth)/auth/error/page.tsx - Error page
- /src/app/(auth)/onboarding/page.tsx - Onboarding flow
- /src/app/(auth)/consent/page.tsx - COPPA consent

- Only 6 shadcn components: Button, Card, Avatar, Input, Label, Form

- data-slot attributes for component part identification
- Responsive with mobile-first breakpoints

3. Create age-adaptive variants for each component
4. Ensure WCAG 2.1 AA compliance on all components
5. Add motion/animation variants respecting reduced-motion

- /src/components/dashboard/progress-charts.tsx - Custom Recharts components
- /src/components/a11y/*.tsx - Accessibility components

- Message formatting: bold, bullet lists, markdown-like
- Typing indicator with animated dots
- Quick question buttons below chat
- Conversation history maintained in state
- API: /api/agents/tutor with learner context

## Required Changes
1. Create modern chat bubble design with Lucide icons
2. Add rich message rendering (code blocks, math, images)
3. Implement voice input option
4. Add message reactions/feedback buttons
5. Create suggested topics based on learning progress
6. Add conversation save/export feature
7. Implement streaming responses for better UX
8. Add 'Ask about this lesson' context integration

title: Analytics & Dashboard Completion Epic
description:
Multiple dashboards exist as routes but have incomplete or placeholder UI. This affects admin, parent, and teacher user experiences.

**Affected Dashboards:**
- /admin/analytics - UI incomplete, only shell exists
- /teacher/reports - Placeholder UI with mock data
- /parent/reports - Minimal UI
- /learner progress analytics - Needs visualization charts

**Scope:**
- Complete admin analytics dashboard with real metrics
- Implement teacher reporting with class/student analytics
- Build parent progress dashboard with child insights
- Add learner progress visualizations (charts, graphs)
- Implement CSV/PDF export for all reports

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Admin can view platform-wide analytics
- [ ] Teachers can export class grades as CSV/PDF
- [ ] Parents can see detailed child progress
- [ ] All dashboards use real data from API
